title: Skills plus MCP Integration and 2026 Evolution · Protocol Clinic: Dependency Declaration
summary: Ship a skill-driven MCP workflow across Codex and Claude with migration controls. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext dependency declaration increment in a production skill and MCP integration package. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Declare skill tool dependencies and provide actionable setup and fallback behavior.
Use a skill to define the workflow while MCP provides narrow live capabilities.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build Dependency Declaration evidence
steps.instruction: Append a agent-ext-dependency-declaration-1c8fsu: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Dependency Declaration into observable performance evidence.

  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
